location: Dropped by the invading NPC Bloody Finger Nerijus, who ambushes you along the riverbed near Murkwater Cave in Limgrave (the same stretch the Night's Cavalry rides at night).
tactics: Head north from Lake Agheel along the stream toward Murkwater Cave; Nerijus invades partway down, before you reach the cave entrance.
He fights with a pair of Reduvia daggers, mixing fast melee slashes with a ranged blood-blade projectile — both inflict bleed, so watch your Hemorrhage buildup.
Spirit Ashes can't be used in this fight, but the NPC Yura shows up to help partway through — let him draw hits while you punish openings.
lore: A jagged, curl-bladed dagger favored by the Lord of Blood's loyal servants — its shape is built to tear on the way in, inflicting bleed with unpleasant efficiency.

builds.name: Arcane bleed build
builds.why: D Dexterity/D Arcane scaling and 50 innate bleed buildup make it a cornerstone early weapon for Arcane bleed builds, and its Ash of War — a ranged bleeding blood-blade projectile — is strong enough to be used on other weapons too.

builds.name: Ranged poke supplement
builds.why: Its skill throws a bleeding projectile, giving melee arcane builds free ranged bleed chip damage.
